scripts.install:linux: npm install && npm install --prefix frontend && (cd backend && python3 -m venv venv && venv/bin/pip install -r requirements.txt)
scripts.install:windows: npm install && npm install --prefix frontend && cd backend && python -m venv venv && venv\Scripts\pip install -r requirements.txt
scripts.backend:linux: bash -c 'cd backend && source venv/bin/activate && python run.py --env development'
scripts.backend:windows: cmd /c "cd backend && venv\Scripts\activate && python run.py --env development"
scripts.backend:prod: bash -c 'cd backend && source venv/bin/activate && python run.py --env production --workers 4'
